description_long: This is a thick, rectangular book with a reddish-brown hard cover, reinforced by dark brown metal or leather corner brackets and two wide horizontal straps that appear to function as clasps. The front cover features a prominent, raised triangular emblem in gold, set within a darker red panel, giving the book a mystical or ancient appearance. The spine is robust and flanked by the same dark brown material, with a central metallic clasp visible. The pages are a light cream color, tightly bound and visible from the side. The book's construction suggests durability and security, likely intended to protect valuable or secret contents. The overall design is stylized, with a fantasy or medieval aesthetic, making it stand out as a special or magical tome.
description: A thick, reddish-brown hardbound book with dark brown clasps and a gold triangular emblem on the front cover, exuding a mystical, ancient vibe.
description_view_0: The book's side shows two wide, dark brown straps and reinforced corners, highlighting its secure, locked appearance.
description_view_1: The spine view reveals the cream-colored pages and a central metallic clasp, emphasizing the book's thickness and sturdy binding.
description_view_2: The front cover displays a gold triangular emblem set in a darker red panel, with two prominent clasps and reinforced corners.
description_view_3: The back view shows the plain reddish-brown cover with the ends of the straps and a subtle crease, lacking any decoration.
attribute_cover_illustration: The front cover features a single, raised gold triangular emblem set in a darker red panel, framed by reinforced corners and wide clasps. There are no other illustrations or decorative artwork visible.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is covered in dark brown material with a central metallic clasp and no visible text or decorative patterns. The design is simple and functional.
